results.title: Global expansion is no longer about reducing information costs, it’s about reducing trust costs
results.description: For decades, globalisation followed a predictable economic logic. Technology lowered the cost of communication, cloud computing reduced infrastructure costs, SaaS standardised business processes, and AI is now making information almost free. Every major wave of innovation has reduced the friction of doing business across borders.
